en: Bezalel made the ark of acacia wood. Two cubits and a half was its length, a cubit and a half its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.
zh: 比撒列用皂莢木做了一個櫃，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分，高六十六公分，

en: And he overlaid it with pure gold inside and outside, and made a molding of gold around it.
zh: 用純金把櫃裡外都包裹了，替櫃的四周做了金牙邊，

en: And he cast for it four rings of gold for its four feet, two rings on its one side and two rings on its other side.
zh: 又鑄造了四個金環，安放在櫃的四腳上，這一邊兩個環，那一邊兩個環。

en: And he made poles of acacia wood and overlaid them with gold
zh: 又用皂莢木做了兩根櫃槓，包上黃金。

en: and put the poles into the rings on the sides of the ark to carry the ark.
zh: 把槓穿在櫃旁的環內，可以抬櫃。

en: And he made a mercy seat of pure gold. Two cubits and a half was its length, and a cubit and a half its breadth.
zh: 又用純金做施恩座，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分。

en: And he made two cherubim of gold. He made them of hammered work on the two ends of the mercy seat,
zh: 又用黃金做了兩個基路伯，是從施恩座的兩端用鎚錘成的；

en: one cherub on the one end, and one cherub on the other end. Of one piece with the mercy seat he made the cherubim on its two ends.
zh: 這端一個基路伯，那端一個基路伯；他在施恩座的兩端做了兩個基路伯，和施恩座連在一起。

en: The cherubim spread out their wings above, overshadowing the mercy seat with their wings, with their faces one to another; toward the mercy seat were the faces of the cherubim.
zh: 兩個基路伯高展著翅膀，用它們的翅膀遮掩著施恩座，它們的臉彼此相對；基路伯的臉都對著施恩座。

en: He also made the table of acacia wood. Two cubits was its length, a cubit its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.
zh: 他又用皂莢木做了一張桌子，長八十八公分，寬四十四公分，高六十六公分。

en: And he overlaid it with pure gold, and made a molding of gold around it.
zh: 用純金把桌子包裹，替桌子的四周做了金牙邊。

en: And he made a rim around it a handbreadth wide, and made a molding of gold around the rim.
zh: 又替桌子的四周做了七十五公釐寬的框子；框子的四周又做了金牙邊。

en: He cast for it four rings of gold and fastened the rings to the four corners at its four legs.
zh: 又替桌子鑄造四個金環，把環子安放在桌子四腳的四角上。

en: Close to the frame were the rings, as holders for the poles to carry the table.
zh: 環子靠近框子，是穿槓的地方，可以抬桌子。

en: He made the poles of acacia wood to carry the table, and overlaid them with gold.
zh: 又用皂莢木做了兩根槓，用金子把槓包裹，可以抬桌子。

en: And he made the vessels of pure gold that were to be on the table, its plates and dishes for incense, and its bowls and flagons with which to pour drink offerings.
zh: 又用純金做桌子的器皿，就是盤子、碟子、碗和奠酒用的杯。

en: He also made the lampstand of pure gold. He made the lampstand of hammered work. Its base, its stem, its cups, its calyxes, and its flowers were of one piece with it.
zh: 他用純金做了一個燈臺，他用鎚錘成燈臺；燈臺的座和幹，跟杯、球、花，都是連在一起的。

en: And there were six branches going out of its sides, three branches of the lampstand out of one side of it and three branches of the lampstand out of the other side of it;
zh: 燈臺的兩邊伸出六個枝子，這一邊有三個燈臺枝子，那一邊也有三個燈臺枝子。

en: three cups made like almond blossoms, each with calyx and flower, on one branch, and three cups made like almond blossoms, each with calyx and flower, on the other branch- so for the six branches going out of the lampstand.
zh: 在這一個枝子有三個杯，形狀好像杏花，有球、有花；在那一個枝子上也有三個杯，形狀好像杏花，有球、有花。從燈臺那裡伸出來的六個枝子都是這樣。

en: And on the lampstand itself were four cups made like almond blossoms, with their calyxes and flowers,
zh: 燈臺上有四個杯，形狀好像杏花，有球、有花；

en: and a calyx of one piece with it under each pair of the six branches going out of it.
zh: 從燈臺伸出的每兩個枝子以下都有一個球，燈臺的六個枝子都是這樣。

en: Their calyxes and their branches were of one piece with it. The whole of it was a single piece of hammered work of pure gold.
zh: 這些球和枝子都是連在一起的，全都是一塊純金錘成的。

en: And he made its seven lamps and its tongs and its trays of pure gold.
zh: 又用純金做燈臺的七個燈盞、燭剪和蠟花盤碟。

en: He made it and all its utensils out of a talent of pure gold.
zh: 他用了三十五公斤純金做燈臺和燈臺的一切器具。

en: He made the altar of incense of acacia wood. Its length was a cubit, and its breadth was a cubit. It was square, and two cubits was its height. Its horns were of one piece with it.
zh: 他用皂莢木做了一座香壇，長四十四公分，寬四十四公分，是正方形的，高八十八公分；壇的四角是與壇連在一起的。

en: He overlaid it with pure gold, its top and around its sides and its horns. And he made a molding of gold around it,
zh: 又用純金把壇包裹，壇頂、壇的四邊和壇的四角都包裹，又替壇做了金牙邊。

en: and made two rings of gold on it under its molding, on two opposite sides of it, as holders for the poles with which to carry it.
zh: 又替壇做了兩個金環，安放在牙邊以下，壇的兩側，就是壇的兩旁，作穿槓的地方，用來抬壇。

en: And he made the poles of acacia wood and overlaid them with gold.
zh: 用皂莢木做了兩根槓，用金包裹。

en: He made the holy anointing oil also, and the pure fragrant incense, blended as by the perfumer.
zh: 又按著製香料者的製法，製聖膏油以及芬芳的純香。
